subject: Life Skills
title: Social Skills
tagline: Build teamwork, communication and conflict resolution skills!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What is 'teamwork'?
options: Someone who listens and supports the team
Listen without interrupting
Own up and help fix it
Working together towards a shared goal
stages.correctOption: Working together towards a shared goal
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Working together towards a shared goal is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Working together towards a shared goal.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: Why is listening important in a team?
options: Own up and help fix it
It helps you understand others' ideas
So everyone contributes and no one is overloaded
It helps members rely on each other
stages.correctOption: It helps you understand others' ideas
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! It helps you understand others' ideas is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is It helps you understand others' ideas.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: What should you do if a teammate disagrees with you?
options: An agreement where each side gives a little
Someone who listens and supports the team
So everyone contributes and no one is overloaded
Listen and find a compromise
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Listen and find a compromise is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Listen and find a compromise.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: What is a 'compromise'?
options: An agreement where each side gives a little
It helps you understand others' ideas
So everyone contributes and no one is overloaded
Working together towards a shared goal
stages.correctOption: An agreement where each side gives a little
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! An agreement where each side gives a little is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is An agreement where each side gives a little.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: Why is it important to share tasks fairly?
options: Working together towards a shared goal
So everyone contributes and no one is overloaded
Someone who listens and supports the team
Understanding how someone else feels
stages.correctOption: So everyone contributes and no one is overloaded
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! So everyone contributes and no one is overloaded is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is So everyone contributes and no one is overloaded.

Listen without interrupting
It helps you understand others' ideas

stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Someone who listens and supports the team is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Someone who listens and supports the team.

stages.name: Stage 7

options: Own up and help fix it
Working together towards a shared goal
Someone who listens and supports the team
Listen and find a compromise
stages.correctOption: Own up and help fix it
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Own up and help fix it is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Own up and help fix it.

options: It helps members rely on each other
Own up and help fix it
Listen without interrupting

options: Listen without interrupting
